started contributing

people who built platforms on top of their gift did
actively, in perpetuity, by ongoing collective choice

does not need to own the protocol

the fight is never over

flatness after you close the app

the promise that is never redeemed
managed by machines, designed to harvest human energy
keeping people pacified inside a representation of reality

told it is more real than your actual experience
the people who were never fully inside

handed a representation of themselves

present with a person it has known for years

must organize, manage, and harvest it

refuses the fixed territory, insists on its own movement

not false, but more legible than the real

how far the effects of that absence will reach
